case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS AQUIRRE, CARLOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,138.28 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT AQUIRRE, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AQUIRRE, CARLOS $3,138.28 PRINCIPAL, $25.84 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,164.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AQUIRRE, CARLOS HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AQUIRRE, CARLOS IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER FANNY SAUREZ PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. REQUEST FOR INTERPRETER MADE FOR NEXT COURT DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
